description: Use this API to apply the modified Gauss-Seidel power flow calculation. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = mslv(options)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of six elements specifying solution options. (input).

options.description: tap adjustment flag (use tap adjustment option setting by default).
area interchange adjustment flag (use area interchange adjustment option setting by default).
enable using tie line flows only in calculating area interchange.
enable using tie line flows and loads in calculating area interchange.
flat start, then estimate voltage magnitudes.
flat start, then estimate voltage phase angles.
flat start, then estimate voltage magnitudes and phase angles.
dc tap adjustment flag (use dc tap adjustment option setting by default).
switched shunt adjustment flag (use switched shunt adjustment option setting by default).
enable continuous mode, disable discrete mode.

error_codes.description: buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
